title: API Settings
subtitle: Manage provider URLs, model lists, and keys. Keys are saved to the backend env and are never fully shown here.
recommendApiDesc: Choose a provider to auto-fill the request URL and protocol.
recommendApiNote: Tip: Your account needs at least 0.05 balance to verify the URL and fetch models.
name: Name
imageHint: Used by Online Image and Canvas API generation.
chatHint: Used by GPT Chat and LLM nodes.
videoHint: Used by Infinite Canvas video generation nodes.
modelsDesc: Fetch all available upstream models and classify them by type (image / chat / video).
volcengineEndpointTip: For Volcengine chat, prefer the Ark inference endpoint ID (ep-...).
volcengineArkKeyDesc: Used by Seedance 2.0 generation APIs with Authorization: Bearer.
volcengineAssetKeysDesc: Used by CreateAssetGroup / CreateAsset / GetAsset with Access Key auth.
volcengineProjectDesc: ProjectName must match the project of the video generation API key.
loraManagerDesc: Bind available LoRAs to ModelScope image models. Canvas MS nodes will filter them by the current model.
loraEmpty: No LoRAs yet. Add one from the top right. It will appear in Canvas MS nodes based on the bound model.
urlTestDisclaimer: Note: this test calls the standard OpenAI /v1/models endpoint. If the platform is not OpenAI-compatible, a failure does not necessarily mean the URL is unusable — please verify manually.
platformNameHint: Used as the unique identifier. Non-ASCII names are auto-converted to an ID.
keepOne: Keep at least one API provider
defaultNoDelete: Default providers cannot be deleted. You can edit name, URL, key, and models.
saved: Saved. Model lists sync to Canvas immediately.
editorSub: Configure basics, API key, and available models
basicHint: Display name, unique ID, and base URL
keyHint: Stored in backend env, never fully shown. Save or clear the key independently.
modelscopeOnlyDelete: ModelScope is the default platform and cannot be deleted
fillKeyFirst: Please enter an API key first
fetchModelsFirst: Fetch models first, or enter a key and click again to auto-fetch
msOnboardingDesc: Get a token first, paste it into API Key, then save to reveal the full settings.
msOnboardingStep: Get a token, paste it, then save
rhOnboardingDesc: RunningHub supports RH Coin and balance keys. RH Coin is required; balance is optional.
rhOnboardingStep: Get keys, paste them, then save
rhWalletPlaceholder: Paste only if you use balance billing
rhEnterCoinAlert: Please enter the RH Coin API Key
rhNoCoinKey: No RH Coin Key saved yet.
rhNoWalletKey: No balance Key saved yet. URL tests and model fetching will prefer it when available.
rhCoinKeyDesc: Use this for RH Coin endpoints
rhWalletKeyDesc: Use this for balance billing endpoints
lingjingOnboardingDesc: No Lingjing key is saved yet. It supports video, image, and LLM models. Paste the key, then save to use it on the canvas.
lingjingOnboardingStep: Get API access, paste the key, then save
recommendPanelSub: Get a key and save it; the right panel will switch to that provider's settings.
recommendPanelDesc: Choose a suitable provider, get a key, then save it as the default setup.
recommendSaved: {name} saved. Showing that provider's settings now.
recommendExellomeSummary: Stable 2K/4K output for GPT-Image2 and Nano Banana.
recommendApimartSummary: Aggregates multiple generation model types for quickly connecting image, video, and LLM workflows with one setup.
recommendFhlSummary: Stable and affordable access to codex/Claude/GPT Image 2 image generation.
recommendVipGptSummary: Supports AI coding models and image generation models, with monthly subscription options.
recommendLingjingSummary: Lingjing API provides image, video, and LLM model access with a dedicated 40% off registration link for lower-cost multi-model workflows.
recommendAgnesSummary: Free Agnes AI API for image and video generation, suitable for quick testing and low-cost setup.
modelPickerFetched: Fetched {{total}} models · use Select Models to choose imports
